blended.narrative: White Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 39 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,832 ft. Looking ahead, 66 inches possible over the next 14 days.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 31" over the past week. Current depth: 84".
